channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: [DARK WEB] ThreatFox: Quasar RAT — 10 new IOCs detected
[DARK WEB] ThreatFox: Stealc — 5 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with stealc .

item.title: ABP Securite Announces Strategic Partnership With Rapid7 to Enhance Cybersecurity in Asia Pacific - Malay Mail
Microsoft’s March 2026 Patch Tuesday Addresses 83 CVEs (CVE-2026-21262, CVE-2026-26127)
item.description:
8 Critical 75 Important 0 Moderate 0 Low
Microsoft addresses 83 CVEs including two vulnerabilities that were publicly disclosed prior to a patch being released. Microsoft patched 83 CVEs in its March 2026 Patch Tuesday release, with eight rated critical and 75 rated as important. Our counts omitted one CVE (CVE-2026-26030) assigned by GitHub.

item.title: How to see your Google Search history (and delete it)
item.description: Your Google Search history provides one of the most detailed windows into your private life, and I know this because when I looked at my own search history last year, I was overwhelmed by the information buried within. Across just 18 months, Google tracked the 8,079 searches I made and the 3,050 websites I visited because of those searches. That included my late-night perusal of WebMD because of medical symptoms I’d looked up just seconds before, my tour of Goodwill donation sites as I search...

item.title: Inside Trump’s Cyber Strategy as the U.S.-Israel War with Iran Continues - SOCRadar® Cyber Intelligence Inc.
Microsoft releases Windows 10 KB5078885 extended security update
item.description:
Microsoft has released the Windows 10 KB5078885 extended security update to fix the March 2026 Patch Tuesday vulnerabilities, including 2 zero-days and an issue that prevents some devices from shutting down. If you are running Windows 10 Enterprise LTSC or are enrolled in the ESU program, you can install this update like normal by going into Settings, clicking on Windows Update, and manually performing a 'Check for Updates.'
Windows 10 KB5078885 update
Source: BleepingComputer
After instal...

Google Threat Intelligence Group uncovered 90 zero-day exploits in 2025, a 15% rise from 2024. Nearly half targeted enterprise software; Microsoft was the top victim. AI-driven attacks may fuel 2026 surge. #ZeroDay #EnterpriseSecurity #USA - x.com

Member Update | Unitel AmCham Mongolia's leading telecommunications and information technology company Unitel announced the findings of a critical zero day vulnerabilities in the Pypdf, a widely-used open-source PDF library. Engineers G. Bilguun (Seni - x.com

A critical @Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN flaw (CVE-2026-20127, CVSS 10.0) is now under widespread exploitation. Initially used as a zero-day by UAT-8616, multiple threat actors are now deploying webshells on vulnerable systems worldwide. Patch ASAP. Are or - x.com

Google reports a rise in enterprise zero-day attacks, with attackers shifting focus from browsers to corporate systems and edge devices. Organisations are urged to tighten security around exposed infrastructure. #cybersecurity #infosec #zeroday - x.com
